message:
Lint cleanup: remove unused vars, fix exhaustive-deps, type any → unknown (#4538)

Reduce lint problems from 960 to 513 (47% reduction):
- Remove unused imports and variables (334 → ~140)
- Fix react-hooks/exhaustive-deps with refs and useCallback
- Replace no-explicit-any with proper types
- Fix empty catch blocks with comments
- 291 files cleaned up

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
